# Cher Ami

> Cher Ami turns your family's photos and stories into a printed monthly magazine, shipped to the people who miss you most — grandparents, long-distance parents, and loved ones. Your family collaborates through the mobile app; recipients just open their mailbox. No app or account needed on their end.

## Key facts

- Product: a printed 8.5×11" glossy photo magazine mailed monthly.
- Price: $12.99 per magazine. First magazine is free.
- Shipping: free within the United States.
- Commitment: none — skip or cancel any time. Billed only when we print and ship.
- Capacity: up to 20 posts per magazine, unlimited contributors per family circle.
- Platforms: iOS and Android apps for contributors. Recipients receive physical mail only.
- Privacy: photos stay within the private family circle. No ads, no data sharing.
- Military edition: 20% off every magazine for service members and veterans.
- Satisfaction guarantee: full refund if it's not what you expected.

## Company

- Name: Cher Ami (operated by Hollow Inc.)
- Website: https://thecherami.com
- Primary market: United States (international shipping planned).

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://thecherami.com/): Product overview, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Start / Get Started](https://thecherami.com/start): Sign-up wizard to create a family circle and claim the first free magazine.
- [Example Magazine](https://thecherami.com/example): See a sample of what the printed magazine looks like.
- [Help Center](https://thecherami.com/help): FAQs organized by topic.
- [Contact](https://thecherami.com/contact): Get in touch with the Cher Ami team.
- [Military Edition](https://thecherami.com/military): 20% off for service members and veterans.

## Blog

- [The Best Mother's Day Gift for a Long-Distance Mom](https://thecherami.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-for-long-distance-mom): Why ordinary gifts fall short for moms who live far away, and the monthly gift that actually closes the distance.
- [9 Mother's Day Gifts for Grandma She'll Actually Use](https://thecherami.com/blog/mothers-day-gifts-for-grandma): A listicle of thoughtful Mother's Day gifts for Grandma, ranging from a monthly photo magazine to handwritten letters and pre-loaded digital frames.
- [What to Get the Mom Who Says She Doesn't Want Anything](https://thecherami.com/blog/gifts-for-mom-who-has-everything): What moms actually mean when they say they don't want anything, and the gift that answers the unspoken request.

## How it works (short version)

1. Download the Cher Ami app on iOS or Android.
2. Create a private family circle and invite relatives.
3. Anyone in the circle adds photos and stories throughout the month.
4. At the start of the next month, Cher Ami prints a magazine and ships it to each recipient in the US.
